metadata.name: IFC PartOf Relationship Knowledge Base
metadata.description: IFC空间关系知识库，用于存储和检索IFC实体间的包含关系

items.name: Building contains Storey
items.definition: A building contains one or more storeys as spatial decomposition.

items.name: Storey contains Space
items.definition: A building storey contains spaces as spatial decomposition.

items.name: Site contains Building
items.definition: A site contains buildings as spatial decomposition.

items.name: Project contains Site
items.definition: A project contains sites as spatial decomposition.

items.name: Space contains Element
items.definition: A space can contain building elements within its boundaries.

items.name: Storey contains Element
items.definition: A building storey can contain building elements within its boundaries.

items.name: Building contains Element
items.definition: A building can contain building elements within its boundaries.

items.name: External Spatial Element contains Element
items.definition: An external spatial element can contain building elements within its boundaries.
